sections.paragraph:
κατάγνωσις, εως, ἡ (s. καταγινώσκω; Thu. et al.; PStras 40, 29; Sb 4670, 5; 4681, 5; 4835, 5; Sir 5:14; Philo, Ebr. 205; Jos., Bell. 6, 34, Vi. 93) condemnation μᾶλλον ἑαυτῶν κ. φέρουσιν ἢ τῆς ὁμοφωνίας they would rather bear condemnation of themselves than of the harmony 1 Cl 51:2.—DELG s.v. γιγνώσκω.

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PStras PStras = Griechische Papyrus der kaiserlichen Universitäts- und Landesbibliothek zu Strassburg—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 516
